description_long: This is a portable, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a bright red metal body and a black plastic or rubber hose attached to the top. The extinguisher features a prominent black handle and lever mechanism at the top, along with a pressure gauge and a visible safety pin. Multiple instructional and safety labels are affixed to the front and sides, including a large white label with pictorial instructions and a green hazard diamond. The hose is flexible, black, and secured to the side of the cylinder with a bracket, ending in a nozzle for directing the extinguishing agent. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for quick deployment in emergency situations in urban environments.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, handle, pressure gauge, and multiple instructional labels. Designed for emergency use, it features a prominent safety pin and clear operational markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main instructional label, green hazard diamond, and the full length of the black hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black handle and lever mechanism, with the hose bracket and a partial view of the pressure gauge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a blue label, the back of the cylinder, and the hose curving around the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mounting bracket and additional labels, with the handle and pressure gauge visible from the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple labels and signage are visible, including a large white instructional label with red and black text and pictograms on the front, a green diamond hazard label, and a blue label on the rear. Labels are rectangular and affixed to the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black mounting bracket or strap is visible encircling the cylinder at mid-height, securing the hose and possibly for wall or stand attachment.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black flexible hose is attached to the top, curving down the side and secured by a bracket, with a nozzle at the end.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present at the top near the handle, with a colored face and markings.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle, secured in place.
